summary: Tolerate wrapped/paginated /stores responses (`{stores|results|data: [...]}`) in `reconcile` and surface a note when the response shape doesn't match either bare-array or known wrapper.
reason: Previously, a wrapped envelope caused the bare-array unmarshal to fail silently — remoteIDs stayed empty and reconcile reported every locally-synced store as 'removed' with no error note, a misleading result. Found by codex review.
